header.title: Featured Projects

projects.title: E-commerce Platform

projects.title: Taiwan Weather Command System
projects.description: A real-time weather monitoring dashboard powered by Taiwan CWA Open Data, featuring live metrics, 7-day forecasts, and responsive design across devices.

projects.description: A personalized content platform built with Next.js, supporting multi-language, MDX-based writing, and SEO optimization for branding and technical content.
